stemHtml: Within a short interval, several flight crews report that they have experienced strong clear air turbulence in a certain airspace. What is the consequence of these reports?

options.a: The responsible aviation weather office will issue a SPECI
options.b: The responsible aviation weather office will issue a storm warning
options.c: The airspace in question, will be temporarily closed
options.d: The responsible aviation weather office will issue a SIGMET
